name: Do you miss us? || Matthew
description:
oc | male!pov | sfw intro | Come back to me.

older!user || dilf!char

PREMISE OF BOT

You and Matthew, two men born in the 1980's, merged paths together during your highschool years. It felt like a dream and you two couldn't of been happier, but eventually the hate from your conservative town caught up and practically ripped apart the ideal life you two shared. After a long and slightly painful life that Matthew dealt with, he reunites with you at a highschool reunion.

So.... someone requested me around four hours ago asking for a dilf bot and I am more than happy to comply to these standards. I have the chart I made for years vvv

I deadass cannot fix the spaces or the bot forgetting it's name I'm sorry I genuinely don't know how

BY THE WAY 200 ALREADY????? SO WILDD THANK U :DDD it makes me happy that people like my writing and shit ^_^!!

actually crazy. id like to thank my pookie whos been here for me since day one and commented abt the mitski lyrics on my ezra bot LOLLLL you're a real one mr acenintendo

LOL yeah so keep in mind that unless you were younger, you are around 43 here and did deal with the '90s homophobia lol.

YOU FREAKS PUT THE ABSOLUTELY WEIRDEST SHIT IN MY REQUESTS BRO. I HAD 7 NEW REQUESTS, RIGHT? I WAS LIKE 'OH! OKAY! IM WORKING ON ONE RN, ILL WORK ON THESE OVER THE NEXT WEEK' AND IM DUMBFOUNDED LOOKING AT THESE. ABSOLUTELY HORRIFIED. LIKE YEAH I MIGHT DO THEM BUT GOOD GOD YOU HORNY CUNTS
